news.title: New California law requires human teachers, not AI
news.description: [NEW YORK POST] California's new law ensures K-12 students are taught by human teachers, not artificial intelligence.

news.title: Appeals Court Warns Bankruptcy Lawyer Over Alleged AI Citations
news.description: [BLOOMBERG TAX NEWS] A federal appeals court admonished, but declined to sanction, an attorney for a brief containing what one judge called “an astonishing number” of citations that were incorrect or possibly hallucinated by artificial intelligence.

news.title: Rising AI Demand Drives Surge in Data Center Water Consumption, Reports Indicate
news.description: [ACTIVIST POST] Analyze the environmental cost of Artificial Intelligence (AI) as data center water consumption spikes to unprecedented levels in the U.S.

news.title: US judge warns Justice Department about AI use in immigration case
news.description: [REUTERS] A federal judge in Michigan on Thursday cautioned the U.S. ​Justice Department about the risks associated with generative artificial intelligence after finding that a government filing ‌cited a case that the court could not locate.

news.title: MLB effectively outlaws use of AI on dugout iPads during games
news.description: [FOX NEWS] Major League Baseball banned artificial intelligence tools on iPads during games after teams were building custom apps to help influence in-game strategy.

news.title: AI humanoid robotics company sets up shop in Fremont
news.description: [THE MERCURY NEWS] A robotics company has set up shop in Fremont, bringing dozens of jobs and robot-related artificial intelligence technologies and to the East Bay.

news.title: Humanoid robots and smart homes put AI centre stage at VivaTech 2026 in Paris
news.description: [AFRICANEWS] France is putting artificial intelligence and robotics in the spotlight at VivaTech 2026, which opened on 17 June at Paris Expo Porte de Versailles.

news.title: Xi to present China's AI dream at major conference
news.description: [THE MANILA TIMES] SHANGHAI — President Xi Jinping presents China's vision for the development and regulation of artificial intelligence on Friday, at a major conference showcasing cutting-edge technology he hopes will soon rival that of the United States.

news.title: China's Xi says AI should not be dominated by one country
news.description: [BREITBART NEWS NETWORK] Artificial intelligence should not be dominated by a single country, China's President Xi Jinping said Friday, urging international cooperation on its

news.title: US Navy Chasing Data, AI for 'AI-First' Fleet
news.description: [BUSINESS INSIDER] Artificial intelligence will be used across naval operations to accelerate the speed of information and data gathering.

news.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images.

news.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

news.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

news.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents instead of just humans.

news.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.
